_comment: CAST Build brand asset manifest. Maps semantic roles to filenames. openclaw and any code that renders a logo must reference assets BY ROLE (e.g. wordmark-light), never by raw filename. CI rejects any HTML referencing /assets/brand/* files not declared here.

icon-default.description: Primary CAST monogram (C in hairline circle). Use for favicons, sidebar marks, small surfaces. Inherits color via currentColor.

icon-square.description: CAST wordmark inside a hairline square. Secondary monogram for editorial surfaces.

wordmark-dark.description: Stacked CAST BUILD wordmark, black on white. Use on light backgrounds.

wordmark-light.description: Stacked CAST BUILD wordmark, white on charcoal. Use on dark backgrounds.

wordmark-brand.description: Hero brand mark. Highest visual weight — reserve for landing pages and Open Graph cards.

wordmark-outline.description: Outline-only wordmark for watermark or background usage.

wordmark-elegant.description: Two-tone CAST BUILD wordmark — CAST filled, BUILD hairline outline. Editorial treatment.

editorial-card.description: Magazine-style editorial composition — page-number top-left, rule, large CAST · BUILD wordmark, attribution. Use as a self-contained block.

wordmark-build-horizontal-light.description: Horizontal CAST BUILD wordmark, white on charcoal. Use in narrow horizontal bars on dark backgrounds.

automation-horizontal-light.description: CAST AUTOMATION horizontal wordmark, white on charcoal. Sister product brand.

automation-stacked-light.description: CAST AUTOMATION stacked wordmark, white on charcoal.

cast-family-mark.description: CAST Community of Companies mark — parent brand association. Top-left of access landing only.

alum-wordmark-light.description: ALÜM project wordmark, white. Use only on Alüm project surfaces, on dark backgrounds.

deprecated._note: These files exist in /assets/brand/ but are NOT to be referenced. Either redundant duplicates, legacy variants, or experimental.

rules: Always reference brand assets by role, never by raw filename. Use the provided pattern or the resolveBrandAsset() helper.
Adding a new asset requires adding a new role here in the same commit.
Renaming a file requires updating the role's file field in the same commit.
Files listed in deprecated.files must not be referenced from any HTML or CSS. CI will fail the build if they are.
Roles are stable contracts: do not rename or remove a role without a deprecation pass.
